tasks.title: Create ansible.cfg
tasks.description: Create the Ansible configuration file that sets localhost as the default target with local connection, disables SSH host key checking, and sets the roles path.
tasks.definition_of_done: ansible.cfg exists at repo root and ansible-playbook can parse it without errors.

tasks.title: Create group_vars/all.yml with shared variables
tasks.description: Create the shared variables file that all roles can reference. Includes XDG paths, identity profile definitions, project directory conventions, and the Berkeley Mono repo URL.
tasks.definition_of_done: group_vars/all.yml exists and defines all shared variables referenced by the design doc.
acceptance_criteria: Defines work and personal identity profile names
Defines 1Password item names/paths for each secret (SSH keys, tokens)
No secrets or tokens are present in the file

tasks.title: Create playbook.yml with role ordering
tasks.description: Create the top-level playbook that composes all roles in the correct dependency order as defined in the design doc section 4.
tasks.definition_of_done: playbook.yml exists, lists all roles in correct order, each role is tagged with its own name, and ansible-playbook --list-tasks succeeds.
acceptance_criteria: Lists all 19 roles in the order specified by design doc section 4
Each role entry includes a tag matching the role name
Running `ansible-playbook playbook.yml --list-tasks` succeeds and shows all roles
Running `ansible-playbook playbook.yml --list-tags` shows one tag per role

tasks.title: Create Makefile with convenience targets
tasks.description: Create the Makefile with help, bootstrap, apply, apply-%, and lint targets as defined in design doc section 11.
tasks.definition_of_done: Makefile exists and `make help` outputs all available targets with descriptions.
acceptance_criteria: make help prints all targets with descriptions

tasks.title: Create bootstrap.sh
tasks.description: Create the idempotent bootstrap script that installs Xcode CLI tools, Homebrew, Ansible, and 1Password CLI, then runs the playbook. Must be safe to re-run.
tasks.definition_of_done: bootstrap.sh exists, is executable, and each step is guarded by a check so re-running is safe.
acceptance_criteria: File exists at ./bootstrap.sh with executable permission (755)
Installs Xcode Command Line Tools only if not already present
Installs Homebrew only if not already present
Installs ansible and 1password-cli via brew only if not already present
Prompts user to sign in to 1Password CLI if not authenticated
Calls ansible-playbook playbook.yml as the final step
Every step is idempotent — re-running on a configured machine produces no side effects
Script exits on first error (set -euo pipefail)

tasks.title: Create xdg role
tasks.description: Create the XDG base directory role that scaffolds all XDG directories and generates an environment file that the zsh role will source.
tasks.definition_of_done: Running the xdg role creates all four XDG directories and writes an env file exporting the XDG variables.
acceptance_criteria: Generates an XDG env file at ~/.config/zsh/xdg.zsh exporting all four XDG vars
All directories are created with mode 0700
Role is idempotent — running twice produces no changes on second run

tasks.title: Create homebrew role
tasks.description: Create the Homebrew role that ensures Homebrew is installed, updated, and healthy.
tasks.definition_of_done: Running the homebrew role ensures Homebrew is present and runs brew update.
acceptance_criteria: Checks if Homebrew is installed; skips install if present
Runs brew update to ensure formulae are current

tasks.title: Create onepassword role
tasks.description: Create the 1Password role that installs the 1Password desktop app and CLI via Homebrew, installs the community.general Ansible collection, and verifies CLI authentication.
tasks.definition_of_done: Running the onepassword role installs 1Password app + CLI and fails with a clear message if not authenticated.
acceptance_criteria: Installs the community.general Ansible collection (for onepassword lookup plugin)
Verifies 1Password CLI is authenticated by running `op account list`
Fails with a clear, actionable error message if CLI is not signed in

tasks.title: Create ssh role
tasks.description: Create the SSH role that provisions work and personal SSH keys from 1Password and deploys an SSH config with host aliases for identity-based routing.
tasks.definition_of_done: Running the ssh role writes SSH keys from 1Password to disk and deploys an SSH config that routes github.com-work and github.com-personal to the correct keys.
acceptance_criteria: Provisions work private key to ~/.ssh/id_ed25519_work (mode 0600) from 1Password
Provisions work public key to ~/.ssh/id_ed25519_work.pub (mode 0644) from 1Password
Provisions personal private key to ~/.ssh/id_ed25519_personal (mode 0600) from 1Password
Provisions personal public key to ~/.ssh/id_ed25519_personal.pub (mode 0644) from 1Password
Deploys SSH config from a Jinja2 template with Host directives for github.com, github.com-work, and github.com-personal
SSH config sets IdentitiesOnly yes for all GitHub hosts
Default github.com host uses the personal key
1Password item names are sourced from group_vars, not hardcoded in the role
No private keys are stored in the dotfiles repository

tasks.title: Create git role
tasks.description: Create the Git role that installs Git via Homebrew, deploys a main config under XDG, and configures identity switching via includeIf directives based on project directory paths.
tasks.definition_of_done: Running the git role creates ~/.config/git/config with includeIf directives and separate identity config files for work and personal.
acceptance_criteria: Deploys main git config at ~/.config/git/config from a template
Main config contains includeIf gitdir:~/Projects/work/ pointing to config-work
Main config contains includeIf gitdir:~/Projects/personal/ pointing to config-personal
Deploys ~/.config/git/config-work with work identity (name, email, signing key) from group_vars
Deploys ~/.config/git/config-personal with personal identity from group_vars
Identity values (name, email) are defined in group_vars/all.yml, not hardcoded in the role

tasks.title: Create gh role
tasks.description: Create the GitHub CLI role that installs gh via Homebrew and configures it to use XDG paths. Identity switching is handled at runtime by GH_TOKEN set via mise.
tasks.definition_of_done: Running the gh role installs gh CLI and configures GH_CONFIG_DIR to use XDG path.
acceptance_criteria: Exports GH_CONFIG_DIR=$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/gh in the shell environment file

tasks.title: Create graphite role
tasks.description: Create the Graphite CLI role that installs Graphite via Homebrew and templates the user_config file with alternativeProfiles populated from 1Password.
tasks.definition_of_done: Running the graphite role installs Graphite CLI and generates ~/.config/graphite/user_config with work and personal profile tokens injected from 1Password.
acceptance_criteria: Deploys user_config from a Jinja2 template
Template contains alternativeProfiles array with work and personal entries
Auth tokens are retrieved from 1Password via the onepassword lookup plugin at provisioning time
The generated user_config file has mode 0600 (readable only by owner)
1Password item names are sourced from group_vars, not hardcoded
No auth tokens appear in the dotfiles repository

tasks.title: Create zsh role
tasks.description: Create the Zsh role that sets up ZDOTDIR redirect via ~/.zshenv, deploys base shell config under XDG, and sources the XDG environment file and any tool-specific env files.
tasks.definition_of_done: Running the zsh role creates ~/.zshenv with ZDOTDIR redirect and deploys shell config files under ~/.config/zsh/.
acceptance_criteria: Creates ~/.zshenv containing only ZDOTDIR=$HOME/.config/zsh and sources $ZDOTDIR/.zshenv
Creates ~/.config/zsh/.zshenv that sources the XDG env file
The .zshrc sources all *.zsh files from a conf.d-style directory or sources tool env files
~/.zshenv is the ONLY dotfile placed in the home directory by this role

tasks.title: Create starship role
tasks.description: Create the Starship role that installs Starship via Homebrew, deploys the minimal prompt config, and adds the init hook to the zsh config.
tasks.definition_of_done: Running the starship role installs Starship and deploys a config that produces a prompt showing exactly user@host:working_dir [git_branch].
acceptance_criteria: Adds `eval "$(starship init zsh)"` to the zsh config
No extra modules are enabled (aws, gcloud, nodejs, python, rust, golang, package, docker_context, cmd_duration are all disabled)

tasks.title: Create mise role
tasks.description: Create the mise role that installs mise via Homebrew, deploys global config under XDG, and adds the shell activation hook to zsh.
tasks.definition_of_done: Running the mise role installs mise, places config under XDG, and activates it in the shell so per-project .mise.toml files are respected.
acceptance_criteria: Deploys a global mise config at ~/.config/mise/config.toml (minimal defaults)
Adds `eval "$(mise activate zsh)"` to zsh config

tasks.title: Create ghostty role
tasks.description: Create the Ghostty role that installs Ghostty via Homebrew and deploys its config under XDG.
tasks.definition_of_done: Running the ghostty role installs Ghostty and places config at ~/.config/ghostty/config.
acceptance_criteria: Config references Berkeley Mono as the font family

tasks.title: Create tmux role
tasks.description: Create the Tmux role that installs Tmux via Homebrew and deploys its config under XDG.
tasks.definition_of_done: Running the tmux role installs Tmux and places config at ~/.config/tmux/tmux.conf.

tasks.title: Create neovim role
tasks.description: Create the Neovim role that installs Neovim via Homebrew. Config is expected at the XDG-native path ~/.config/nvim/ (managed separately or by the user).
tasks.definition_of_done: Running the neovim role installs Neovim and ensures the XDG config directory exists.
acceptance_criteria: Creates ~/.config/nvim/ directory if it does not exist
Plugin data directory ~/.local/share/nvim/ is created if it does not exist

tasks.title: Create claude-code role — installation
tasks.description: Create the Claude Code role that installs Claude Code via the officially supported method (npm global or Homebrew) and ensures its config directory exists.
tasks.definition_of_done: Running the claude-code role installs Claude Code and the claude command is available in the shell.
acceptance_criteria: Installs Claude Code (via Homebrew or npm, whichever is officially supported)
Ensures config directory exists at ~/.config/claude/ (or the tool's default)
The `claude` command is available after running the role

tasks.title: Create claude-code MCP server global configuration
tasks.description: Configure the global/user-level MCP server settings for Claude Code with default (personal) credentials. Projects that need work identity override via their own .mcp.json.
tasks.definition_of_done: A global MCP server config exists with personal-identity defaults for dual-account services (Linear, Figma). Credentials are sourced from 1Password.
acceptance_criteria: Global MCP config is deployed to the Claude Code user-level settings location
Config includes Linear MCP server with personal account credentials
Config includes Figma MCP server with personal account credentials
Credentials reference environment variables (not hardcoded tokens)
A shell env file sets the default MCP credential env vars via op read from 1Password

tasks.title: Create zed role
tasks.description: Create the Zed role that installs Zed via Homebrew cask.
tasks.definition_of_done: Running the zed role installs Zed editor.

tasks.title: Create aerospace role
tasks.description: Create the Aerospace role that installs Aerospace via Homebrew cask and deploys its config under XDG.
tasks.definition_of_done: Running the aerospace role installs Aerospace and deploys config to ~/.config/aerospace/.

tasks.title: Create raycast role
tasks.description: Create the Raycast role that installs Raycast via Homebrew cask.
tasks.definition_of_done: Running the raycast role installs Raycast.

tasks.title: Create apps role
tasks.description: Create the apps role that installs remaining GUI applications (Google Chrome, Figma, Linear, Slack, Gather) via Homebrew casks.
tasks.definition_of_done: Running the apps role installs all listed GUI applications.
acceptance_criteria: Installs gather via Homebrew cask (or correct cask name for GatherV2)
Removing an app from the list does not break the role

tasks.title: Create fonts role (Berkeley Mono)
tasks.description: Create the fonts role that clones the private Berkeley Mono repository via SSH and installs font files to ~/Library/Fonts/.
tasks.definition_of_done: Running the fonts role clones the private repo and copies all .ttf/.otf files to ~/Library/Fonts/.
acceptance_criteria: Clones the private Berkeley Mono repo to $XDG_DATA_HOME/fonts/berkeley-mono using SSH
Repo URL is read from group_vars (berkeley_mono_repo variable), not hardcoded
Finds all .ttf and .otf files in the cloned repo recursively
Skips cloning if repo is already cloned and up to date (idempotent)
Font files are not stored in the dotfiles repository

tasks.title: Create identity switching documentation and templates
tasks.description: Create documentation that explains how identity switching works and provides template .mise.toml and .mcp.json files that users can copy into work projects.
tasks.definition_of_done: A docs/identity-switching.md file exists with clear instructions and copy-pasteable templates for setting up a work project.
acceptance_criteria: Explains how Git identity switching works automatically via includeIf
Explains how SSH host aliases work (github.com-work) and how to clone work repos
Provides a template .mise.toml for a work project with GH_TOKEN, GRAPHITE_PROFILE, LINEAR_API_KEY, and FIGMA_TOKEN using op read
Provides a template .mcp.json for a work project referencing env vars for MCP servers
Explains how to add a new dual-account MCP server
Explains the default fallback (personal identity when no context is set)
